briefdescription.para: Returns the absolute value of a.
Rounds x up to the nearest multiple of a.

detaileddescription.para: Since the rounding is performed with a bitmask, a MUST be a power of two.

briefdescription.para: Returns the minimum of a and b.

detaileddescription.para: Guaranteed to return the opposite of MAX(), i.e., if MAX() returns a then MIN() returns b and vice versa.

briefdescription.para: Returns the maximum of a and b.

detaileddescription.para: Guaranteed to return the opposite of MIN().

briefdescription.para: Returns the number of array members in a.
Returns true if x is a power of two, and false otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: Note that zero is considered to be a power of two.

briefdescription.para: Obtains the address of a structure from the address of one of its members.

detaileddescription.para: This macro only works for plain old data structures (PODSs) and performs no type or NULL checking.

briefdescription.para: This is the public header file of the utilities library.

detaileddescription.para:
